title: Serpyan

body:
🌟 Welcome to the Serpyan modpack!

We’re running a 1.21.7 Fabric modpack with Simple Voice Chat and performance-enhancing mods to keep the game smooth and enjoyable. It’s mostly vanilla+, so you get the classic Minecraft feel with better optimisation and small quality-of-life features.(will deff be adding more mods in the futute)

🎉 Come join us, have fun, and help build a chill, friendly community together!
